using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using TUnit.Assertions.Core;
using TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core;

namespace TUnit.Assertions.Should.Extensions;

public static partial class ShouldMyEqualsExtensions
{

    public static global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.ShouldAssertion<TValue> BeEqualTo<TValue>(this global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.IShouldSource<TValue> source, TValue expected, [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpression("expected")] string? expectedExpression = null)
    {
        var innerContext = source.Context;
        innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(".BeEqualTo(");
        innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(expectedExpression);
        innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(")");
        var inner = new global::MyNamespace.MyEqualsAssertion<TValue>(innerContext, expected);
        return new global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.ShouldAssertion<TValue>(innerContext, inner);
    }
}

using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using TUnit.Assertions.Core;
using TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core;

namespace TUnit.Assertions.Should.Extensions;

public static partial class ShouldCollectionContainsAssertionExtensions
{

    public static global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.ShouldAssertion<TCollection> Contain<TCollection, TItem>(this global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.IShouldSource<TCollection> source, TItem expected, System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer<TItem>? comparer = default, [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpression("expected")] string? expectedExpression = null, [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpression("comparer")] string? comparerExpression = null)
        where TCollection : System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<TItem>
    {
        var innerContext = source.Context;
        innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(".Contain(");
        var __added = false;
        if (expectedExpression is not null)
        {
            if (__added) innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(", ");
            innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(expectedExpression);
            __added = true;
        }
        if (comparerExpression is not null)
        {
            if (__added) innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(", ");
            innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(comparerExpression);
            __added = true;
        }
        innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(")");
        var inner = new global::TUnit.Assertions.Conditions.CollectionContainsAssertion<TCollection, TItem>(innerContext, expected, comparer);
        return new global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.ShouldAssertion<TCollection>(innerContext, inner);
    }
}

using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;

public static partial class ShouldCollectionDoesNotContainAssertionExtensions
{

    public static global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.ShouldAssertion<TCollection> NotContain<TCollection, TItem>(this global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.IShouldSource<TCollection> source, TItem expected, System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer<TItem>? comparer = default, [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpression("expected")] string? expectedExpression = null, [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpression("comparer")] string? comparerExpression = null)
        where TCollection : System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<TItem>
    {
        var innerContext = source.Context;
        innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(".NotContain(");
        var __added = false;
        if (expectedExpression is not null)
        {
            if (__added) innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(", ");
            innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(expectedExpression);
            __added = true;
        }
        if (comparerExpression is not null)
        {
            if (__added) innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(", ");
            innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(comparerExpression);
            __added = true;
        }
        innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(")");
        var inner = new global::TUnit.Assertions.Conditions.CollectionDoesNotContainAssertion<TCollection, TItem>(innerContext, expected, comparer);
        return new global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.ShouldAssertion<TCollection>(innerContext, inner);
    }
}

{

    public static global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.ShouldAssertion<TCollection> Contain<TCollection, TItem>(this global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.IShouldSource<TCollection> source, System.Func<TItem, bool> predicate, [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpression("predicate")] string? predicateExpression = null)
        where TCollection : System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<TItem>
    {
        var innerContext = source.Context;
        innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(".Contain(");
        innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(predicateExpression);
        innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(")");
        var inner = new global::TUnit.Assertions.Conditions.CollectionContainsPredicateAssertion<TCollection, TItem>(innerContext, predicate);
        return new global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.ShouldAssertion<TCollection>(innerContext, inner);
    }

    {

using System;

public static partial class ShouldCollectionIsInDescendingOrderAssertionExtensions
{

    public static global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.ShouldAssertion<TCollection> BeInDescendingOrder<TCollection, TItem>(this global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.IShouldSource<TCollection> source)
        where TCollection : System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<TItem>
    {
        var innerContext = source.Context;
        innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(".BeInDescendingOrder(");
        innerContext.ExpressionBuilder.Append(")");
        var inner = new global::TUnit.Assertions.Conditions.CollectionIsInDescendingOrderAssertion<TCollection, TItem>(innerContext);
        return new global::TUnit.Assertions.Should.Core.ShouldAssertion<TCollection>(innerContext, inner);
    }
}
